topic: My back gate is open every morning, latched from the outside.
title: My Back Gate Opens From the Outside | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning my back gate stood open, latched from the outside.
scenes.image_prompt: A wooden backyard gate swung open in morning fog, latch hanging loose, dim gray light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My yard was fenced tall on every side, with one gate.
scenes.image_prompt: A tall wooden fence enclosing a small backyard at dusk, single gate, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I latched it shut each night before dark.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand closing a metal gate latch in fading light, deep shadow, dim glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The latch only reaches from outside the fence.
scenes.image_prompt: A close view of a gate latch mounted on the outer side of a wooden fence, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So someone stood out there every night.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty grassy strip behind a tall fence at twilight, faint streetlight, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: In the mud beyond the gate I found one set of footprints.
scenes.image_prompt: A single trail of bare footprints in wet mud leading away from a fence gate, dim dawn light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I followed them across the field at first light.
scenes.image_prompt: Footprints crossing a foggy open field toward distant trees, gray morning, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The prints circled my house, then ended at my own door.
scenes.image_prompt: Muddy footprints ending at a closed back door of a house, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I padlocked the gate. The lock was open by dawn, unbroken.
scenes.image_prompt: An open padlock hanging from a closed gate latch, intact and undamaged, gray fog, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then the footprints started appearing inside my house too.
scenes.image_prompt: Faint muddy footprints crossing a wooden interior floor in dim hallway light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep the gate locked. It no longer matters.
scenes.image_prompt: A locked backyard gate seen from inside the fence at dusk, long shadows, dim glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I latched it myself and found the latch already on the inside.
scenes.image_prompt: A gate latch unexpectedly mounted on the inner side of a fence, dim night light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
